name: BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time
notes: Detects 3 or more failed mailbox logins within 2 minutes by a single user.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250316) MailboxLogin-failed
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username in 2 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250316) MailboxLogin-failed
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username in 2 minutes
